2026/05/18 19:05:34.196655450 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196660908 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196688014 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196700598 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196701629 {
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196714759 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196715500 new <- list()
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196728500 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196729171 new$width <- width
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196752866 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196753577 new$height <- height
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196769146 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196770698 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196788705 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196789627 new$title <- title
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196803668 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196804429 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196836016 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196836848 new$version <- version
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196851910 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196852701 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196872020 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196872792 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196888044 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196888906 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196902086 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196902907 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196916237 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196917068 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196932401 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196933262 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196958020 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196958851 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196977148 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196977970 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197015456 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197016347 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197028550 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197039532 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197040564 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197057259 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197058020 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197076197 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197077158 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197094144 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197094945 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197104654 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197120904 "default"))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197121765 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197136738 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197137549 }
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197150859 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197151771 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197168536 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197169387 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197183999 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197184860 }
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197195891 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197206763 }
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197207534 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197221685 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197222437 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197236818 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197237639 domain = NA)
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197253633 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197254375 }
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197268215 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197269107 old$family <- family
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197290038 }
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197290960 version <- old$version
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197306082 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197306954 "2.0")
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197320874 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197321656 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197338110 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197338942 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197353864 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197354625 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197371240 domain = NA)
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197372031 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197393554 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197394695 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197414365 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197415256 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197433474 invisible()
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197434225 }

2026/05/18 19:05:34.196655450 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196660908 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196688014 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196700598 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196701629 {
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196714759 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196715500 new <- list()
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196728500 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196729171 new$width <- width
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196752866 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196753577 new$height <- height
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196769146 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196770698 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196788705 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196789627 new$title <- title
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196803668 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196804429 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196836016 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196836848 new$version <- version
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196851910 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196852701 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196872020 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196872792 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196888044 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196888906 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196902086 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196902907 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196916237 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196917068 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196932401 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196933262 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196958020 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196958851 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196977148 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.196977970 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197015456 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197016347 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197028550 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197039532 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197040564 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197057259 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197058020 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197076197 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197077158 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197094144 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197094945 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197104654 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197120904 "default"))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197121765 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197136738 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197137549 }
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197150859 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197151771 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197168536 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197169387 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197183999 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197184860 }
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197195891 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197206763 }
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197207534 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197221685 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197222437 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197236818 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197237639 domain = NA)
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197253633 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197254375 }
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197268215 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197269107 old$family <- family
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197290038 }
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197290960 version <- old$version
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197306082 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197306954 "2.0")
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197320874 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197321656 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197338110 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197338942 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197353864 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197354625 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197371240 domain = NA)
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197372031 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197393554 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197394695 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197414365 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197415256 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197433474 invisible()
2026/05/18 19:05:34.197434225 }
